settings.general.serverHint: Switching servers signs you out — the device token is valid for one server only. Local content is kept; sign in again on the new server afterwards.
settings.general.favoriteBookHint: The favorite book opens at launch and drives the page picker. You can also switch it any time from the toolbar.
settings.general.switchServerAlertMessag: You'll be signed out and need to sign in again on the new server. Local content that hasn't synced yet is kept.
settings.language.label: App language
settings.language.hint: Language of the app interface. Without an explicit choice it follows your server profile; “Automatic” follows the system language (German or English). The change takes effect immediately.
settings.appearance.hint: “Automatic” follows the system; Light/Dark forces the look for shell and editor.
settings.appearance.focusHint: Controls how strongly the editor dims the surroundings of the active paragraph. The change takes effect immediately in the open editor.
settings.appearance.windowHint: For distraction-free writing use native full screen (⌃⌘F) — there the toolbar hides automatically. Auto-hide brings the toolbar back in the window only when the pointer moves to the top edge.
settings.typo.measureHint: Limits line length (in characters) for more comfortable reading. “ch” ≈ the width of one digit.
settings.typo.paperHint: “System” follows Light/Dark. Other tones force a fixed writing surface (e.g. Sepia for warm light).
settings.typo.dimHint: In focus mode the editor dims the inactive paragraphs. “Off” uses the editor default (theme-correct); when on, you set the strength yourself.
settings.writing.showStats: Show word count & reading time in the toolbar
settings.writing.goalHint: Shows a progress bar in the toolbar until the open page reaches the goal. The app is designed for exactly one page — so the goal applies per page.
settings.writing.autosaveHint: Wait time after the last keystroke before the draft is saved. Takes effect the next time the editor opens. Local saving still always happens first (no data loss).
settings.sync.cadenceHint: How often the active window checks for changes. “Relaxed” saves battery/data; “Manual only” syncs solely on demand.
settings.sync.pauseHint: Holds automatic syncing until you turn it back on or restart the app. Local changes stay queued.
sync.conflict.serverGone: Page no longer exists on the server — your local version is kept.
settings.spell.deviceHint: Checking runs via LanguageTool on the server (online only). This switch can additionally turn it off per device — even when it's enabled on the server.
settings.spell.languageHint: “Automatic” lets the server choose the language (from the book language, usually Swiss German). A fixed choice overrides that per device.
settings.spell.serverNote: Strictness (picky) and active rules are managed on the server and can't be changed here.
spell.extensionConflict.title: LanguageTool browser extension detected
settings.account.signOutHint: Signing out only removes the device token from the keychain. Local content that hasn't synced yet is kept.
settings.account.updateHint: A newer editor bundle is downloaded and takes effect at next launch (no switch mid-writing).
settings.account.clearCacheHint: Reloads the editor assets fresh from the server. Affects only the editor — your texts (local mirror) stay untouched.
settings.account.signOutAlertMessage: You'll need to sign in again with a device token afterwards. Local content is kept.
settings.account.clearCacheAlertMessage: The editor is reloaded from the server. Without a connection it won't be available until the next successful download. Your texts are kept.
toolbar.closePageHelp: Close page — return to the calm canvas
toolbar.tip.noGoal: Word count of the open page · {today} · ~{min} min reading time
toolbar.tip.serverUnreachable: Server unreachable — local changes are saved safely and will sync once the server responds again
save.tip.dirty: Unsaved change — saved locally on its own in a moment
login.tokenHint: Create the token in Schreibwerkstatt under “My account → Device token” and paste it here. It's shown only once.
login.subtitle: Sign in to sync your pages.
login.heroTagline: Distraction-free writing — one page, fully offline-capable. Your pages sync with Schreibwerkstatt.
picker.noPagesHint: Create a page on the web, or pick another book.
picker.noBookHint: Choose a book in the toolbar on the left.
about.body: Native macOS shell (SwiftUI/AppKit + WKWebView) for exactly one page, fully offline-capable. The editor itself is loaded over the air from the Schreibwerkstatt server — no fork, no clutter.
auth.err.malformedToken: Invalid token format. Expected “swd_…” from your account area.
auth.err.unauthorized: Token invalid or revoked. Please issue a new device token in Schreibwerkstatt.
